title: derris benthamii
intro: Derris benthamii, also known as the toxic bean, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Derris benthamii include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. In herbal preparations, Derris benthamii is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a medical professional before using it due to its toxicity.
